homePage.title: Swipe2Watch
homePage.subTitle: Choose what to watch together. Quick and fun.
homePage.solve: Solve the problem of choosing a movie once and for all
homePage.helps:
Swipe2Watch helps your company quickly choose a movie, TV series or anime to watch together. No
                        endless arguments - just swipes and instant decision!
homePage.descRoom:
Create a new room, select content categories and invite your friends to join. It only takes a
                            couple of seconds!
homePage.roomCode:
Do you have a room code? Enter it below to quickly join a selection of content with your
                            friends.
homePage.step1: Create a room and select content categories: movies, TV series, anime, or all at once.
homePage.step2: Send the room code to your friends so they can join the selection.
homePage.step3: Browse through the options offered and swipe right if you like an option.
homePage.step4: Once all participants have liked the same option, it's done! The decision has been made.
homePage.service: Swipe2Watch — Service for selecting content in the company

waitingPage.name: Your name
waitingPage.share: Share the room code with your friends to start swiping together!
waitingPage.ready: Great! You have enough participants to start.
waitingPage.waitingMore: Waiting for more participants to join...

swipeScreen.title: Content has run out, view matches or go back to the home page
swipeScreen.swipeMobile: Swipe left to dislike, right to like

matchScreen.keep: Keep swiping to find content that everyone likes!

createRoom.name: Name your room and set maximum number of participants
createRoom.contentCategories: Content categories (select anime or series, movies are still in development)
createRoom.selectCategories: Select the types of content to view (at least one)
createRoom.share: Share this code with your friends so they can join your room.
